# Dr. Thankappan's Dental Clinic

> Dr. Thankappan's Dental Clinic is a trusted dental clinic in Kochi offering modern dental care, laser-assisted procedures, teeth whitening, smile correction, clear aligners, and comprehensive dental treatments.

## Important Pages

* Home: /
* Laser Dentistry: /laser-dentistry-kochi
* Services: /services
* Doctors: /doctors
* Book Appointment: /book
* Contact: /contact
* About: /about
* FAQ: /faq
* Gallery: /gallery
* Testimonials: /testimonials

## Dental Services

* Laser Dentistry
* Teeth Whitening
* Gum Depigmentation
* Gum Recontouring
* Smile Correction
* Clear Aligners
* Aesthetic Restorations
* Root Canal Treatment
* Dental Cleaning
* Dental Implants
* Braces and Aligners
* Crowns and Bridges
* Jaw Pain Relief

## Booking

Patients can book appointments online through the website. Select a treatment, choose a date and time, and submit details. The clinic confirms through WhatsApp.

## Contact

* Phone: +91 94471 21519
* Email: drthankappandentalclinic@gmail.com
* Address: Kochi, Kerala (exact address on contact page)
* Working Hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM–2:00 PM, Sun Closed
